---
title: "Real-Data Ensemble — Run Control"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

This workbook builds the real-data RSS ensemble job for the geometric N20 loci
and writes the SLURM-ready artifacts.

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
here::i_am("vignettes/real data pipeline/run_control_workbook_real_data_ensemble.Rmd")
library(here)
library(devtools)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)

susine_path <- here("..", "susine")
if (file.exists(file.path(susine_path, "DESCRIPTION"))) {
  options(test_susine.local_susine_path = normalizePath(susine_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  devtools::load_all(susine_path)
}
devtools::load_all(".")
```

# 1. User Configuration

```{r config}
DRY_RUN <- TRUE

job_name <- "real_data_ensemble_geometric_n20"
manifest_path <- here("data", "real_case_studies", "geometric_n20_loci", "locus_manifest.csv")

email <- "mgc5166@psu.edu"
slurm_time <- "05:59:59"
slurm_mem <- "8G"
cpus_per_task <- 1L
slurm_partition <- NULL
slurm_account <- "statsresearch_sc_default"

L <- 10L
max_iter <- 100L
tol <- 1e-5
cs_coverage <- 0.95
cs_min_purity <- 0.5
jsd_threshold <- 0.15
softmax_temperature <- 1
estimate_residual_variance <- FALSE

c_grid_8 <- seq(0, 1.5, length.out = 8)
sigma_grid_8 <- c(0.01, 0.03, 0.07, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.7, 1.0)

dry_run_loci <- NULL
if (isTRUE(DRY_RUN)) {
  job_name <- paste0(job_name, "_dry")
  c_grid_8 <- 0
  sigma_grid_8 <- 0.2
  manifest_preview <- readr::read_csv(manifest_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  dry_run_loci <- manifest_preview$locus_id[[1]]
  slurm_time <- "00:29:59"
  message(
    "DRY_RUN active. Single-locus, single-grid-point smoke test.\n",
    "  job_name = ", job_name, "\n",
    "  locus    = ", dry_run_loci, "\n",
    "  fits     = 1 functional (c=0, sigma=0.2) + 1 susieR anchor"
  )
}
```

# 2. Build Job Config

```{r build-config}
job_config <- test_susine::build_real_data_job_config(
  job_name = job_name,
  manifest_path = manifest_path,
  loci = dry_run_loci,
  output_root = here("output"),
  L = L,
  c_grid_values = c_grid_8,
  sigma_grid_values = sigma_grid_8,
  max_iter = max_iter,
  tol = tol,
  cs_coverage = cs_coverage,
  cs_min_purity = cs_min_purity,
  jsd_threshold = jsd_threshold,
  softmax_temperature = softmax_temperature,
  estimate_residual_variance = estimate_residual_variance,
  email = email,
  time = slurm_time,
  mem = slurm_mem,
  cpus_per_task = cpus_per_task,
  partition = slurm_partition,
  account = slurm_account,
  HPC = TRUE
)

job_config$tables$tasks
```

# 3. Run Inventory

```{r inventory}
job_config$tables$runs %>%
  dplyr::count(run_family, backend)
```

```{r per-locus}
job_config$tables$runs %>%
  dplyr::count(locus_id, run_family) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = run_family, values_from = n)
```

# 4. Write Artifacts

```{r write-artifacts}
artifacts <- test_susine::write_real_data_job_artifacts(
  job_config,
  run_task_script = here("inst", "scripts", "run_real_data_task.R")
)

kable(tibble::enframe(artifacts, name = "artifact", value = "path"))
```

# 5. Submission Reminder

```{r submit, results='asis'}
cat(
  "Run the job with:\n\n",
  "`sbatch ", artifacts$slurm_script, "`\n",
  sep = ""
)
```
